mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.pen_name AS penName, n.description, n.cover_url AS cover, n.create_time AS createTime, n.update_time AS updateTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `novel_character` c WHERE c.novel_id = n.id) AS charCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `story_node` s WHERE s.novel_id = n.id) AS nodeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `novel_relation` r WHERE r.novel_id = n.id) AS relationCount FROM `novel` n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.update_time DESC
